storage.note: Flat rate, no tiers, no regions — single global price

egress.note: R2 egress is free — this is R2's primary differentiator

classA.description: Writes: PutObject, CopyObject, ListBuckets, ListObjects, etc.

notes.noTiers: R2 has no storage classes or access tiers — all storage is hot by default.
notes.noEgress: Zero egress fees regardless of volume. No free tier limit on egress.
notes.noRegions: R2 storage is globally distributed. No region selection needed.
notes.s3Compatible: R2 is S3-compatible. Bills may reference S3-style API operations.
